gt_sql: SELECT T2.year FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
pred_sql:
SELECT r.year
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CAST(res.fastestLapTime AS REAL) ASC
LIMIT 1;
question: State the racing year which has the fastest lap time?
